# characteristics

**Instance Property**

A list of characteristics discovered in this service.

## Declaration

```swift
var characteristics: [CBCharacteristic]? { get }
```

## Discussion

This array contains [doc://com.apple.corebluetooth/documentation/CoreBluetooth/CBCharacteristic] objects that represent a service’s characteristics. Characteristics provide further details about a peripheral’s service. For example, a heart rate service may contain one characteristic that describes the intended body location of the device’s heart rate sensor, while another characteristic transmits heart rate measurement data.

## Accessing Service Data

- **includedServices**: A list of included services discovered in this service.
